name: Simple Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fruit either pureed, chopped, or mashed (bananas, peaches, any kind of berry, cherries, etc)
1 teaspoon vanilla extract (or try some almond extract if you are using cherries or peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat the eggs and sugar until they form a thick, light-yellow mixture.
2. Add the pureed fruit, cream, and flavorings to the egg mixture and stir until well blended.
3. Process in either a conventional ice cream freezer or in one of the non-electric ice cream makers that you chill in your freezer before using.
YIELD: about 1 quart
